primitive_witness.theorem_statement: For the Z3 triplet basis, P^3=I and P alone is irreducible but periodic.  The lazy positive-cone transfer L=(I+P)/2 has L^2=(I+2P+P^2)/4, whose entries are all strictly positive.  Therefore L is primitive.  Perron-Frobenius gives a unique positive eigenvector, here the uniform triplet vector, and the stochastic powers converge to the rank-one uniform projector.

proposal_allowed_reason: The finite-matrix primitive theorem is exact, but the current PR230 surface still lacks the same-surface action/off-diagonal generator that would instantiate the theorem.
